questionHtml:
Which isomers exist as non-superimposable mirror images?

A.     cis-trans isomers

B.     diastereomers

C.     enantiomers

D.     structural isomers

meta.title: Which isomers exist as non-superimposable mirror images? A. cis-trans isomers B. diastereomers C. enantiomers D. structural isomers
